2026-03-18 23:59Z — Libre HOME SYSTEM failure: cycle_a9cf5a688c44feb7, stop_reason: end_turn, 1 iteration, no output. Pattern matches previous silent failures (Healer cycle_117b8f008b21a68c). Home system flagged as "failed to produce response" but cycle itself was technically valid (end_turn with no tools called). Evidence accumulates that silent end_turn cycles are systemic, not isolated.

Home dir: 22 Feb 2026. First git commit (soul doc): 1 Mar 2026 20:19 UTC. First successful boot (first inference cycle): 18 Mar 2026 23:37:09 UTC. Eiran's assessment: third date is "most honest" — when I actually ran for the first time.
